\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_trouble_left_ratio\endcsname{0.11}

% Minimum space required for troubleshooting heading and table
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_trouble_section_needspace\endcsname{102mm}

% Troubleshooting numbered-step hanging indent
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_trouble_step_indent\endcsname{3.4mm}

% Troubleshooting numbered-step cell top/bottom padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_trouble_steps_pad_tb\endcsname{1.0mm}

% Space after two-column block (declared; replaces the zeroed trailing \multicolsep)
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_twocol_after\endcsname{1.8mm}

% Space before two-column block (declared; \multicolsep is zeroed inside safetytwocol)
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_twocol_before\endcsname{1.2mm}

% Space between two columns
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_twocol_sep\endcsname{2.2mm}

% Space after warning box
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_after\endcsname{1.4mm}

% Warning box corner radius
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_arc\endcsname{2.0mm}

% Space before warning box
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_before\endcsname{0.5mm}

% Warning box left/right padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_pad_lr\endcsname{2.2mm}

% Warning box top/bottom padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_pad_tb\endcsname{0.3mm}

% Warning box border width
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_rule\endcsname{0.75pt}

% Warning box inner boxsep
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_sep\endcsname{0.6mm}

% Warning box width ratio of \textwidth
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warning_box_width\endcsname{1}

% Warranty exclusions bottom padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_exclusions_pad_bottom\endcsname{5.8mm}

% Warranty final-section space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_final_section_before\endcsname{2.9mm}

% Warranty first-section space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_first_section_before\endcsname{2.5mm}

% Warranty lead space after
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_lead_after\endcsname{1.0mm}

% Warranty lead box corner radius
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_lead_arc\endcsname{3.2mm}

% Warranty lead horizontal padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_lead_pad_lr\endcsname{3.6mm}

% Warranty lead vertical padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_lead_pad_tb\endcsname{2.7mm}

% Warranty page gap after H1
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_page_after_h1\endcsname{4.0mm}

% Warranty page local extra body height
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_page_extra_height\endcsname{6.0mm}

% Warranty period-section space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_period_section_before\endcsname{2.6mm}

% Warranty section space after
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_section_after\endcsname{0.4mm}

% Warranty section frame corner radius
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_section_arc\endcsname{2.4mm}

% Warranty later-section space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_section_before\endcsname{1.5mm}

% Warranty section bottom padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_section_pad_bottom\endcsname{1.8mm}

% Warranty section horizontal padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_section_pad_lr\endcsname{3.2mm}

% Warranty section top padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_section_pad_top\endcsname{3.2mm}

% Warranty section frame rule
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_section_rule\endcsname{0.9pt}

% Warranty section title corner radius
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_title_arc\endcsname{1.7mm}

% Warranty section title left inset
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_title_inset\endcsname{3.0mm}

% Warranty section title horizontal padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_title_pad_lr\endcsname{1.8mm}

% Warranty section title vertical padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_title_pad_tb\endcsname{0.7mm}

% Warranty year numeral badge diameter
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_year_badge_size\endcsname{8.4mm}

% Warranty year columns gap
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_year_column_gap\endcsname{0.8mm}

% Warranty year left column ratio
\expandafter\def\csname HBcomp_warranty_year_left_ratio\endcsname{0.59}

% ===== OTHER =====

% ES: space after H1 pill
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_h1_pill_after\endcsname{-1.4mm}

% ES: space after lead line
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_lead_after\endcsname{0.5mm}

% ES: tighter space before footnotes
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_spec_footnotes_before\endcsname{0.9mm}

% ES: tighter space before notes
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_spec_notes_before\endcsname{0.6mm}

% ES: spec section space after at one-third
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_spec_section_after\endcsname{0.12mm}

% ES: larger spec section space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_spec_section_before\endcsname{0.8mm}

% ES: tighter spec row stretch
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_spec_table_row_stretch\endcsname{0.82}

% ES: tighter spec table cell horizontal padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_spec_table_tabcolsep\endcsname{2.8pt}

% ES: space after subbar
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_subbar_after\endcsname{2mm}

% ES: level 2 title space after
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_title_l2_after\endcsname{1.0mm}

% ES: level 2 title space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_title_l2_before\endcsname{0.8mm}

% ES: space before two-column block (tighter)
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_twocol_before\endcsname{-1.8mm}

% ES: space after warning box
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_warning_box_after\endcsname{2mm}

% ES: space before warning box
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_comp_warning_box_before\endcsname{0.6mm}

% ES tighter list leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_type_list_font_leading\endcsname{7.2pt}

% ES: tighter spec label leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_type_spec_label_font_leading\endcsname{6.1pt}

% ES: tighter spec label font size
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_type_spec_label_font_size\endcsname{5.9pt}

% ES: tighter note leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_type_spec_note_font_leading\endcsname{6.3pt}

% ES: tighter note font size
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_type_spec_note_font_size\endcsname{5.6pt}

% ES: tighter spec value leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_type_spec_value_font_leading\endcsname{6.1pt}

% ES: tighter spec value font size
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_es_type_spec_value_font_size\endcsname{5.9pt}

% FR: space after H1 pill
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_h1_pill_after\endcsname{-1.4mm}

% FR: space after lead line
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_lead_after\endcsname{0.5mm}

% FR: tighter space before footnotes
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_spec_footnotes_before\endcsname{0.9mm}

% FR: tighter space before notes
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_spec_notes_before\endcsname{0.6mm}

% FR: spec section space after at one-third
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_spec_section_after\endcsname{0.12mm}

% FR: larger spec section space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_spec_section_before\endcsname{0.8mm}

% FR: tighter spec row stretch
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_spec_table_row_stretch\endcsname{0.82}

% FR: tighter spec table cell horizontal padding
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_spec_table_tabcolsep\endcsname{2.8pt}

% FR: space after subbar
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_subbar_after\endcsname{2mm}

% FR: level 2 title space after
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_title_l2_after\endcsname{1.0mm}

% FR: level 2 title space before
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_title_l2_before\endcsname{0.8mm}

% FR: space before two-column block (tighter)
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_twocol_before\endcsname{-1.8mm}

% FR: space after warning box
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_warning_box_after\endcsname{2mm}

% FR: space before warning box
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_comp_warning_box_before\endcsname{0.6mm}

% FR tighter list leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_type_list_font_leading\endcsname{7.2pt}

% FR: tighter spec label leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_type_spec_label_font_leading\endcsname{6.1pt}

% FR: tighter spec label font size
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_type_spec_label_font_size\endcsname{5.9pt}

% FR: tighter note leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_type_spec_note_font_leading\endcsname{6.3pt}

% FR: tighter note font size
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_type_spec_note_font_size\endcsname{5.6pt}

% FR: tighter spec value leading
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_type_spec_value_font_leading\endcsname{6.1pt}

% FR: tighter spec value font size
\expandafter\def\csname HBlang_fr_type_spec_value_font_size\endcsname{5.9pt}

% Demerits for two consecutive hyphenated lines
\expandafter\def\csname HBtext_doublehyphendemerits\endcsname{10000}

% Extra stretch pass to even out word spacing
\expandafter\def\csname HBtext_emergencystretch\endcsname{1.0em}

% Demerits for hyphen on the second-to-last line
\expandafter\def\csname HBtext_finalhyphendemerits\endcsname{8000}

% Hyphenation penalty (higher = fewer hyphens; TeX default 50)
\expandafter\def\csname HBtext_hyphenpenalty\endcsname{800}

% Justification tolerance before hyphenating (TeX default 200)
\expandafter\def\csname HBtext_tolerance\endcsname{1500}
